name: QA 913
description:
PCP QA Test No. 913

Exercise the Redis PMDA and metrics.



Copyright (c) 2017 Red Hat.



**To reproduce this test in a container, please run:**

    ./build/ci/run.py --runner container --platform ubuntu1604 reproduce

output mismatch (see 913.out.bad)

< Culling the Performance Metrics Name Space ...
< redis ... not found in Name Space, this is OK
< Updating the PMCD control file, and notifying PMCD ...
< Check redis metrics have gone away ... OK
---
> Remove: cannot find domain.h (or similar) to determine the Performance Metrics Domain
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
PMDA probe: pminfo -h db1c1a872c32 -f sample.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h db1c1a872c32 -f sampledso.milliseconds
PMDA probe: pminfo -h db1c1a872c32 -f simple.numfetch
